metadata.purpose: Privacy policy page displaying data protection and privacy information, GDPR compliance, and user rights.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.description: This is a placeholder for the Privacy Policy. In a real application, this section would contain detailed legal definitions, user rights, data processing agreements, and compliance information regarding GDPR, CCPA, and other relevant regulations.

sections.title: Data Usage

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: This Privacy Policy explains how Contact360 collects, uses, and protects your data. In a production deployment, this section would be maintained by legal and compliance teams.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: This Privacy Policy explains how Contact360 collects, uses, and protects your data. In a production deployment, this section would be maintained by legal and compliance teams.

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.body: We are committed to protecting your personal data and respecting your privacy. This policy describes what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

sections.heading: 2. Data Usage
sections.body: We process data to provide and improve our services, comply with legal obligations, and protect our users. Full GDPR and CCPA details would be described here.
